summary: Risk annotation classifier uses the exact POST-path allowlist (isUngatedValidationRoute) that mirrors client.go's isValidationStyleMutation, instead of a broad "validate" substring heuristic.
reason: Greptile P1: the substring heuristic tagged certificates validate and agents verify-acme as Barrier:none, but client.go's exact allowlist still gated them, so the help text contradicted runtime enforcement (ErrWriteRequiresApproval). The two functions now share the same allowlist and stay in sync.
